VtmCharacterSheet.name: Name
VtmCharacterSheet.damageTrackHelp: In Edit mode, click a box to cycle empty → superficial → aggravated → empty. Maximum Health and Willpower are calculated from Attributes plus bonus boxes.
VtmCharacterSheet.skillsHelp: Click the current rating again to reset a Skill to 0. Enter multiple Specialties separated by commas.
VtmCharacterSheet.disciplinesHelp: Add only the Disciplines the character possesses. Enter multiple Powers separated by commas. Click the selected rating again to reset it to 0.
VtmCharacterSheet.sectionComingNext: This section will be implemented in the next development step.
VtmCharacterSheet.advantagesHelp: Add Advantages and Flaws as separate entries. Click the selected rating again to reset it to 0.
VtmCharacterSheet.advantagesComingNext: Editable dot-based rows will be implemented in a later step.
VtmCharacterSheet.portraitHelp: JPG, PNG or WebP, up to 5 MB.
VtmCharacterSheet.portraitInvalidType: Choose a JPG, PNG or WebP image.
VtmCharacterSheet.portraitTooLarge: The portrait must be 5 MB or smaller.
VtmCharacterSheet.portraitUploadError: The portrait could not be uploaded. Please try again.

VtmDiceRoller.metadataDescription: Make a private, local Vampire: The Masquerade Fifth Edition dice roll.
VtmDiceRoller.title: Personal Dice Roller
VtmDiceRoller.description: Roll ordinary and Hunger dice locally. Nothing is saved or shared, and a roll is interpreted only when you press Roll.
VtmDiceRoller.entryDescription: Make a private VtM V5 roll with optional Difficulty and a clear Hunger-dice result.
VtmDiceRoller.difficultyHelp: Leave blank to count successes without resolving success or failure.

displayMode.label: Dice display
displayMode.help: Changing the display does not reroll or reinterpret the result.

VtmDiceRoller.difficultyOmitted: No Difficulty was set. Successes are counted, but success or failure remains unresolved.
VtmDiceRoller.criticalPairBelowDifficulty: A critical pair added its bonus successes, but the roll still did not meet the Difficulty.
VtmDiceRoller.unpairedTen: One ten remained outside a critical pair.

success.title: Success
success.description: The roll meets the Difficulty without a critical outcome.

failure.title: Failure
failure.description: The roll does not meet the Difficulty and has no overriding Hunger failure.

total-failure.title: Total failure
total-failure.description: The roll has zero successes and does not meet the Difficulty.

bestial-failure.title: Bestial failure
bestial-failure.description: The roll fails and at least one Hunger die shows 1.

ordinary-critical.title: Critical success
ordinary-critical.description: The roll succeeds with a critical pair and no Hunger ten in that outcome.

messy-critical.title: Messy critical
messy-critical.description: The roll succeeds with a critical pair that includes a Hunger ten.

successes-counted.title: Successes counted
successes-counted.description: No Difficulty was set, so the final success or failure is unresolved.

critical-pair-unresolved.title: Critical pair counted
critical-pair-unresolved.description: The critical pair adds successes, but without Difficulty no critical outcome is resolved.

no-successes-unresolved.title: No successes counted
no-successes-unresolved.description: No Difficulty was set, so even a zero-success roll remains unresolved.

darkPack.title: Dark Pack notice
darkPack.unofficial: This is unofficial World of Darkness fan material and is not endorsed by Paradox Interactive.

validation.poolInteger: Dice Pool must be a whole number.
validation.poolRange: Dice Pool must be from {minimum} through {maximum}.
validation.hungerDiceRequired: Enter the number of Hunger Dice.
validation.hungerDiceInteger: Hunger Dice must be a whole number.
validation.hungerDiceRange: Hunger Dice must be from {minimum} through {maximum}.
validation.hungerExceedsPool: Hunger Dice cannot exceed the Dice Pool.
validation.difficultyRequired: Enter a Difficulty or leave the field blank.
validation.difficultyInteger: Difficulty must be a whole number.
validation.unexpected: The roll could not be validated. Check the inputs and try again.
validation.randomUnavailable: Secure local randomness is unavailable in this browser.
